title: Viper (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Viper''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The frigate had, along with several other rebel starships were part of a military summit located at the [[Delfii system/Legends|Delfii system]]. The ship was for some reason needing new engines which were delivered by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Deep]]''. Her cargo was warheads.

==Appearances==
